summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of landing pages converted from static HTML to React. All 5 landing pages (Home, AI Tools, Apps, Pricing, About) render correctly with proper content, styling, and navigation. All features tested successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing pages fully tested and working. All navigation links work correctly. App modal opens/closes properly. Filter buttons on Apps page work. Slides carousel on Home page works. Mobile responsive design verified.
tests_passed: Home page renders with hero section, slides carousel, features section
AI Tools page renders with 5 tool cards showing credit costs
Apps page renders with 6 app cards and filter buttons (All, Live now, AI Tools, Music, Branding)
Pricing page renders with 3 plan cards (Free, Creator, Pro) with correct pricing
About page renders with mission statement and company story
Navigation links work between all landing pages
Get Started Free button navigates to /auth
Slide navigation dots work on Home page
App card click opens modal with app details
Filter buttons on Apps page filter apps correctly
Footer links present and styled correctly
Netbar portal switcher present with Music/Business tabs

design_review.text_contrast: Good - Hero subtitle rgba(210, 215, 245, 0.82), Nav links rgb(240, 240, 245), Footer text rgb(144, 150, 184)
design_review.layout: Proper grid layouts for feature cards, pricing cards, app cards
design_review.responsive: Mobile view shows condensed nav with Get Started button visible
design_review.styling: CSS variables properly applied, consistent color scheme
